result.summary: Found several visual issues, mainly missing/obscured interactive text and overlapping elements near the bottom of the page.

issues.description: The yellow rounded button in the top-right header appears blank, with no visible label or icon.
issues.suggestion: Add the intended button text, such as “Log In” or “Join Now,” and ensure it has sufficient contrast against the yellow background.

issues.description: The “SCROLL DOWN” overlay overlaps the small legal/disclaimer text near the bottom of the promotional section, making part of the text unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Move the scroll prompt above or below the disclaimer area, or add spacing so it does not cover required legal copy.

issues.description: The legal/disclaimer text is extremely small and low in readability, especially over the bright yellow background and with overlapping UI nearby.
issues.suggestion: Increase the font size, improve line spacing, and ensure the disclaimer is not obstructed by floating elements.

issues.description: The BetRivers logo card at the top of the hero appears clipped or tucked under the header, with only the lower rounded corners visible.
issues.suggestion: Add top spacing below the header or adjust the hero positioning so the full logo card is visible and intentionally framed.
